prompt.content:
Combine the insights from the five Data Center expert interviews (Richardson, Torres, Hasting, Sarah Chen, and Thomas Chen) around typical CAPEX vs OPEX. State the midpoint in the range of total CAPEX and annual OPEX per MW reported by each interviewee. Format your output as a table with the columns: Interviewee, Midpoint CAPEX ($M/MW), and Midpoint Annual OPEX ($M/MW). Then, calculate a grand total average CAPEX per MW and a grand total average OPEX per MW based on averaging all the midpoint values from each respondent. Return the outputs in a console message, rounding dollar amounts to the nearest $0.1M. 

Exclude responses without numeric figures from the analysis. If a respondent provides CAPEX or OPEX estimates for multiple data center types, use the estimates for a standard data center only.

messages.content: States the midpoint CAPEX for David Richardson is a value different than $13.0M per MW.

golden_responses.golden_text_response:
Midpoint CAPEX and OPEX per MW by Interviewee:
Interviewee	Midpoint CAPEX ($M/MW)	Midpoint Annual OPEX ($M/MW)
David Richardson / Jennifer Park (CoreSite)	13.0 	1.0 
Michael Torres (Digital Realty)	11.3	1.0
Rob Hastings (SecureVault)	13.6	0.8
Thomas Chen (CyrusOne)	14.0	0.9

Grand Total Averages (Midpoint-Based):
CAPEX: $13.0M per MW
OPEX: $0.9M per MW
